title: Boost for Electric Vans and Buses Backed with Investment to Drive Innovation
content:
New industry and government funding announced to boost zero emission vehicle tech, creating jobs and helping deliver long-term economic growth.
Over 40 cutting edge projects across five competitions include next generation battery-electric bus and developing electric trucks for the Royal Mail and NHS.Dozens of cutting-edge, green vehicle technology projects including ultra-lightweight vehicles, zero emission buses and new battery technology are set to benefit from Â£88 million of joint funding to take the UK a step closer to net zero.
author: Analysts Account
